prose:
Method-provenance block
Property: Fukui–reactivity indices (f⁺, f⁻, dual descriptor) for benzaldehyde; headline value = largest electrophilic Fukui function f⁺ = 0.39938965 on atom 3 (C).  
Level of theory: DFT, tier "standard" → B3LYP/def2-TZVP (no density-fitting) in PySCF 2.x (via chemkit).  
Geometry provenance: user-supplied Cartesian coordinates in /home/erobles/…/benzaldehyde.xyz; single-point charges on this fixed geometry (no re-optimization) → DFT//(input XYZ).  
Solvent / environment: gas phase (no implicit solvation).  
Charge 0, multiplicity 1 (closed-shell singlet).  
Population scheme: Mulliken charges from the PySCF SCF solutions for the N, N-1, and N+1 states (cation/anion multiplicities 2).
